headline: Welcome to AI-Prowler™ Home Version 7.0
body:
Your Personal Agentic AI Knowledge Base for Claude AI.
AI-Prowler™ Home Version 7.0 for Windows 11 — index your local documents and put 57 AI-powered tools at Claude's fingertips, on desktop, web, and mobile.
★ Index local and OneDrive documents from any folder — 65+ file formats supported including scanned PDFs and images with full OCR text extraction.
★ ChromaDB vector database with rich metadata and semantic encoding — Claude queries intelligently across 10,000+ files with provenance-aware results.
★ 57 MCP tools across 8 categories: Agentic RAG search, Code Tools, Self-Learning, Action Tools, Email, Dev Tools, Indexing, and Health checks.
★ Code Tools — Claude can create, edit, back up, and restore files in pre-authorized directories with a double-lock security model and per-session circuit breaker.
★ Self-Learning system — Claude records business lessons, corrections, and insights into a persistent knowledge base and applies them automatically in future sessions.
★ Smart Scan skips binaries and system files automatically. Scheduled auto-updates keep your index current.
★ Connect via Claude Desktop (local/stdio) or Claude.ai and the Claude mobile app (remote/HTTPS). One-click Cloudflare Quick Tunnel or permanent registered domain.
★ AI-Prowler™ Home is free for desktop use with Claude Desktop and the free MCP tier.
★ AI-Prowler™ Business (now avaliable) — multi-user server mode with role-based access, per-user document isolation, and admin panel.
Get started: click the Index Docs tab to add your first folder.
footer: AI-Prowler™ Home — Free home desktop use  |  Mobile extentions subscription available
